DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Feb-22-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANTS CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, GAVIN NEWSOM, HEATHER FONG, and, WILLIAM SIFFERMAN DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT. Appearances: Matthew D. Davis, Esq. of Walkup, Melodia, Kelly & Schoenberger (415) 981-7210 appearing for Plaintiff and opposing party; Kris Kobach, Esq. (913) 638-5567 appearing for Plaintiff and opposing party; Scott D. Wiener, Deputy City Attorney, CCSF,(415) 554-4283 appearing for Defendants and moving party. Hearing held and argued and the matter is submitted for decision. (302/CWW)Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard, Court Reporter: Carol Karen CSR # 8189

MOTION TO ADMIT COUNSEL PRO HAC VICE
Off Calendar Dec-09-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: PLAINTIFFS DANIELLE BOLOGNA, MICHAEL BOLOGNA, MATTHEW BOLOGNA, ANDREW BOLOGNA, and, FRANCESCA BOLOGNA MOTION TO ADMIT KRIS W. KOBACH AS COUNSEL PRO HAC VICE. Appearances: Emily Wecht, Esq. of Walkup, Melodia, Kelly, Wecht & Schoenberger (415) 981-7210, appearing for Plaintiffs and moving party. The Court adopted and amended its tentative ruling as follows: Granted, proof of state bar fee provided at hearing. No opposition filed.
